title: OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT - 211info
text: ADDICTION MEDICINE CLINIC LAPINE LOCATION OUTPATIENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers intensive outpatient treatment for alcohol and drug recovery. 51340 Highway 97 Suite 119 La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Outpatient treatment: By appointment only (541) 668-9070 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 668-9070 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. Sliding scale fee may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable AREA SERVED: Varies by site Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
